--- format: html: code-fold: show code-summary: "Ocultar código" code-line-numbers: false code-annotations: false code-link: true code-tools: source: true toggle: true caption: "Código" code-overflow: scroll page-layout: full editor_options: chunk_output_type: console categories: - GEOM_AAA - GEOM_BBB - GEOM_CCC execute: eval: false echo: true warning: false title: "Semana 09" date: last-modified author: Víctor Gauto --- XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX XXXXX DESCRIPCIÓN DE LA FIGURA XXXXX XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX ::: {.column-page-right} ![Semana 09, 2026](semana_09.png) ::: ## Paquetes ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(glue) library(ggtext) library(showtext) library(tidyverse) ``` ::: ## Estilos Colores. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} c1 <- "#9792be" c2 <- "#f29e51" c3 <- "#cc1c2f" c4 <- "white" c5 <- "grey10" ``` ::: Fuentes: Ubuntu y JetBrains Mono. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} font_add( family = "ubuntu", regular = "././fuente/Ubuntu-Regular.ttf", bold = "././fuente/Ubuntu-Bold.ttf", italic = "././fuente/Ubuntu-Italic.ttf" ) font_add( family = "jet", regular = "././fuente/JetBrainsMonoNLNerdFontMono-Regular.ttf" ) showtext_auto() showtext_opts(dpi = 300) ``` ::: ## Epígrafe ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fuente <- glue( "Datos: ", "{{tidytuesdayR}} semana 09, ", "Sex Ratio Bias Triggers Demographic Suicide in a Dense Tortoise Population.
Arsovski, D., Bonnet, X., Golubović, A., & Tomović, L. (2026)" ) autor <- glue("**Víctor Gauto**") icon_twitter <- glue("") icon_instagram <- glue("") icon_github <- glue("") icon_mastodon <- glue("󰫑") icon_bsky <- glue("") usuario <- glue("**vhgauto**") sep <- glue("**|**") mi_caption <- glue( "{fuente}
{autor} {sep} {icon_github} {icon_twitter} {icon_instagram} ", "{icon_mastodon} {icon_bsky} {usuario}" ) ``` ::: ## Datos ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load(2026, 09) clutch_size_cleaned <- tuesdata$clutch_size_cleaned tortoise_body_condition_cleaned <- tuesdata$tortoise_body_condition_cleaned ``` ::: ## Procesamiento Me interesa comparar la cantidad de tortugas macho y hembra, colocando un ícono por individuo. Defino los íconos en formato [svg](https://icon-sets.iconify.design/) y asigno colores para machos y hembras. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} tortuga <- '' tortuga_m <- sub("ESCAMA", c1, x = tortuga) tortuga_f <- sub("ESCAMA", c2, x = tortuga) ``` ::: Función que asigna posiciones cartesianas a un arreglo circular para la cantidad de tortugas, divididas por sexo. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} f_circulo <- function(P) { area_cuadrado <- P / (pi / 4) p_lado <- ceiling(sqrt(area_cuadrado)) expand_grid( y = p_lado:1, x = 1:p_lado ) |> mutate( r = map2_lgl(x, y, \(x, y) { sqrt((x - p_lado / 2)^2 + (y - p_lado / 2)^2) < p_lado / 2 }) ) |> filter(r) } ``` ::: Agrego las posiciones de cada individuo y desplazo levemente para que no se ubiquen en una grilla regular. Escalo para que abarquen la misma extensión. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} j <- .2 d <- tortoise_body_condition_cleaned |> distinct(individual, sex) |> arrange(individual) |> count(sex) |> mutate(coord = map(n, f_circulo)) |> unnest(cols = coord) %>% mutate( y2 = y + rnorm(n = nrow(.), mean = 0, sd = j), x2 = x + rnorm(n = nrow(.), mean = 0, sd = j) ) |> mutate( y2 = scale(y2) |> as.numeric(), x2 = scale(x2) |> as.numeric(), .by = sex ) ``` ::: ## Figura Defino título y tamaño de los íconos. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} tamaño_svg <- 3 mi_titulo <- glue( "En **Macedonia del Norte**, hay una cantidad excesiva de tortugas macho comparada con las hembras.
Ellas, ante las constantes agresiones sexuales de ellos, se tiran de precipicios." ) ``` ::: Figura. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} g <- ggplot() + ggsvg::geom_point_svg( data = filter(d, sex == "f"), aes(x2, y2), svg = tortuga_f, size = tamaño_svg ) + ggsvg::geom_point_svg( data = filter(d, sex == "m"), aes(x2, y2), svg = tortuga_m, size = tamaño_svg ) + geom_text( data = count(d, sex), aes(x = I(1), y = I(0), label = paste0("n = ", n)), family = "jet", hjust = 1, vjust = 0, color = c4 ) + coord_equal(clip = "off", expand = FALSE) + facet_wrap(vars(sex), nrow = 1) + labs(title = mi_titulo, caption = mi_caption) + theme_void(base_family = "ubuntu", base_size = 15) + theme_sub_panel(spacing.x = unit(30, "pt")) + theme_sub_plot( background = element_rect(fill = c5), title = element_markdown( color = c4, hjust = .5, lineheight = 1.2, margin = margin(b = 15, t = 10) ), caption = element_markdown( color = c2, size = 10, lineheight = 1.2, margin = margin(t = 20, r = 5, b = 5) ) ) + theme_sub_strip(text = element_blank()) ``` ::: Guardo. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} ggsave( plot = g, filename = "tidytuesday/2026/semana_09.png", width = 30, height = 18, units = "cm" ) ``` :::
